title: A Dividend Aristocrat That Could Crash And One That Could Potentially Triple

title: 3 Long-Term Stocks to Buy as a New Bull Market Emerges
text: Finding the right long-term stocks to buy is an attractive option for investors looking to maximize their returns over time. They provide the opportunity to benefit from a company's growth over a longer period, as opposed to short-term investments, which can be more volatile and unpredictable.

title: Wall Street Analysts See Lowe's (LOW) as a Buy: Should You Invest?

title: The Dividend Kings Ranked By Quality Score

title: LOWE'S INVITES COMMUNITIES NATIONWIDE TO NOMINATE PROJECTS FOR LOWE'S HOMETOWNS IMPACT PROGRAM
text: 100 signature projects will be selected from nominations to rebuild or renovate community spaces as Lowe's continues five-year, $100 million commitment MOORESVILLE, N.C. , Jan. 24, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- As part of its goal to make homes – and hometowns – better for all, Lowe's today announced it is accepting nominations for the second year of Lowe's Hometowns, a five-year, $100 million impact program and the company's largest-ever commitment of its kind.

title: 3 Irresistible Dividend Kings
text: I'm starting this article with a theoretical background explaining the benefits that come with high-quality dividends. We dive into empirical evidence supporting a wide variety of dividend strategies. The theme of this article is dividend kings, which are stocks that have hiked their dividends for at least 50 consecutive years.

title: Selecting Dividend Aristocrats Using SCHD Methodology - Slow And Steady
text: I propose leveraging the stock selection criteria from the underlying index of SCHD to build a portfolio with a subset of Dividend Aristocrats. I am tracking two portfolios built using this process and comparing the results to NOBL and SCHD.

title: 7 Must-Buy Stocks if Inflation Sinks
text: Without a doubt, inflation is decelerating in America, as the country's Consumer Price Index actually declined 0.1% in December compared with November. If inflation continues to sink, several sectors whose performances are heavily influenced by consumers' spending power and/or interest rate levels should outperform going forward.

title: Lowe's Pilots In-Store Birthday Parties to Inspire the Next Generation of Builders
text: Expanding upon the success of kid's workshops, a new, hands-on birthday party experience is launching at select Lowe's stores, as a fun way to spark creativity in future builders MOORESVILLE, N.C. , Jan. 19, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Lowe's (NYSE: LOW) today announced an in-store kids' birthday party program that aims to inspire the next generation of builders while giving parents a comprehensive one-stop party solution.

title: Industrial REITs: Shortages Become Gluts
text: Pressured by global recession concerns, Industrial REITs dipped by 30% in 2022 - the sector's worst year on record- snapping a seven-year streak of outperformance over the broader REIT Index. The frenzied investment in logistics space clashed with already-tight supply, fueling an incredible surge in rent growth across logistics and warehouse properties. Market rents have soared 50% since early 2021.
